name: humanclaw
description: HumanClaw desktop pet and VRM assistant frontend for OpenClaw.

scripts.desktop:dev: concurrently -k -s first -n vite,electron -c cyan,magenta "pnpm dev" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env AIGRIL_DESKTOP_DEV_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.desktop:package: pnpm build && pnpm exec electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win nsis portable
